text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey. You know your whole workflow? Yeah, I
restructured it. Just sent it over, so take a look.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You have no idea how much time you've been wasting. At least try to be efficient.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Too much drive can blind you, you know
that?
